title: Xi tells Musk, Tim Cook and other CEOs on Trump's trip: China will 'open wider'
summary_full: Tesla and Space X boss Elon Musk, Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang and Apple CEO Tim Cook were part of Trump's delegation.
summary_public: Tesla and Space X boss Elon Musk, Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang and Apple CEO Tim Cook were part of Trump's delegation.
